Module 6 - Lesson 6
The 	Thank You Page “Gift Offer” Add-On

-- 1 of 2 --

Module 6 - Lesson 6
Elements Of The Thank You Page Add-On Offer:!
•Presented On A“Mock” Thank You Page!
•Presented With A VSL (No CTA Delay)!
•Presented As A “Thank You Gift” For New Customers!
•30-Day Trial Continuity Offer!
•Priced Up To $27-$47/month!
•CTA Button Copy Reinforces “Gift Offer”!
•“Yes, I’ll Take My Free Month”
The 	Thank You Page “Gift Offer” Add-On

-- 2 of 2 --
